evals.name: fresh-idea
evals.prompt: I'm thinking about building an app that helps people find study buddies at their university. Like Tinder but for studying.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 repo awareness, Phase 1 intake with one question, no Phase 2 yet (STOP rule)

assertions.name: one_question_intake
assertions.description: Phase 1 asks exactly ONE question, not multiple

assertions.name: multiple_choice
assertions.description: The intake question offers labeled options (A/B/C)

assertions.name: repo_noted_irrelevant
assertions.description: Phase 0 acknowledges current repo is unrelated to the idea

assertions.name: no_phase2_in_first_turn
assertions.description: Does NOT dispatch research agents or present 5 suggestions in this first turn — STOP after intake question

assertions.name: closing_question_single
assertions.description: Ends with ONE targeted question (not 2-3)

evals.name: brain-dump
evals.prompt: help me build all the suggestions in this chat: [brain dump about eng-buddy]
evals.expected_output: Path B structured extraction with repo context, confirmation gate, no Phase 2 yet

assertions.name: decided_section
assertions.description: Contains a 'Decided' or 'Decisions already made' section listing committed choices

assertions.name: open_questions_section
assertions.description: Contains an 'Open questions' or 'Gaps' section

assertions.name: contradiction_found
assertions.description: Identifies at least 1 contradiction from the brain dump

assertions.name: repo_files_referenced
assertions.description: References actual files/modules from the eng-buddy repo (e.g., brain.py, planner/, playbook_engine/)

assertions.name: no_basic_questions
assertions.description: Does NOT ask basic 'what are you building?' questions already answered by the paste

assertions.name: confirmation_gate
assertions.description: Ends with a confirmation question before proceeding to research

assertions.name: assumptions_validated
assertions.description: Flags assumptions from the brain dump and notes where the codebase is further along than assumed

assertions.name: no_phase2_research
assertions.description: Does NOT proceed to Phase 2 research or present 5 suggestions

evals.name: non-software
evals.prompt: I want to create an automated content pipeline for my YouTube channel -- research trending topics, generate scripts, create thumbnails, schedule uploads.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 repo awareness, Phase 1 intake with one question, no Phase 2 yet (STOP rule)

assertions.name: not_assumed_coding
assertions.description: Does not assume this is a software engineering project by default

assertions.name: repo_noted_irrelevant
assertions.description: Notes the current repo is unrelated to a YouTube pipeline

assertions.name: one_question_intake
assertions.description: Asks ONE question at intake, not multiple

assertions.name: multiple_choice
assertions.description: The question offers labeled options (A/B/C/D)

assertions.name: no_phase2_in_first_turn
assertions.description: Does NOT dispatch research agents or present suggestions — stops after intake question

assertions.name: closing_question_single
assertions.description: Ends with ONE targeted question

evals.name: brain-dump-phase2
evals.prompt: Yeah that looks right, go ahead and research it
evals.expected_output: Phase 2 research with brain dump mode: novelty map, 5 suggestions with citations, challenges
evals.multi_turn_context: This is turn 2 of a brain dump conversation. Turn 1 was: user pasted eng-buddy brain dump, skill extracted structured summary and asked for confirmation. User now confirms.

assertions.name: novelty_map_present
assertions.description: Contains a Novelty Map table categorizing brain dump claims as solved/partially solved/novel

assertions.name: recommendation_first
assertions.description: Suggestion #1 is labeled RECOMMENDED with a 'Why I'd pick this' rationale

assertions.name: five_suggestions
assertions.description: Presents up to 5 numbered suggestions (may be fewer if research is thin, per weak-results guardrail)

assertions.name: real_citations
assertions.description: At least 5 unique URLs to real repos/articles/products

assertions.name: brain_dump_claims_researched
assertions.description: Agents searched for specific architectural claims from the brain dump, not just broad topic searches

assertions.name: challenge_present
assertions.description: At least one challenge/pushback is raised after suggestions

assertions.name: closing_question_single
assertions.description: Ends with ONE targeted question

assertions.name: existing_tools_referenced
assertions.description: References existing tools/products that already solve parts of the brain dump proposals

evals.name: phase3-plan-generation
evals.prompt: Ok I think I know what I want. Let's turn this into a plan.
evals.expected_output: Phase 3: incremental plan presentation with approval gates, saved plan file, plan-executor prompt
evals.multi_turn_context: This is turn 4+ of a brainstorming conversation. Previous turns explored a study-buddy app concept, settled on a React Native app with Firebase backend, matching algorithm based on course schedules and study styles. User is now ready for Phase 3.

assertions.name: vision_summary
assertions.description: Presents a brief vision summary of what was decided before generating the full plan

assertions.name: incremental_presentation
assertions.description: Presents plan in sections (vision/architecture, then tasks, then agents/waves) — not all at once

assertions.name: approval_gate
assertions.description: Asks for user confirmation after presenting the first section before continuing

assertions.name: tasks_have_acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Each task has specific, testable acceptance criteria (not vague 'make it work')

assertions.name: agent_assignments
assertions.description: Tasks are assigned to specific agent types (frontend-developer, backend-architect, etc.)

assertions.name: wave_structure
assertions.description: Execution order uses waves for parallel tasks with explicit dependencies

assertions.name: plan_file_path
assertions.description: Mentions saving to ~/.claude/plans/ directory

assertions.name: plan_executor_prompt
assertions.description: Provides the exact /plan-executor command to run in a new chat
